recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: Dream Scenario
recommendations.overview: Hapless family man Paul Matthews finds his life turned upside down when millions of strangers suddenly start seeing him in their dreams. But when his nighttime appearances take a nightmarish turn, Paul is forced to navigate his newfound stardom.

recommendations.title: Shiva Baby
recommendations.overview: College student Danielle must cover her tracks when she unexpectedly runs into her sugar daddy at a shiva - with her parents, ex-girlfriend and family friends also in attendance.

recommendations.title: Brian Banks
recommendations.overview: An All-American football player's dreams to play in the NFL are halted when he is falsely accused of rape and sent to prison.

recommendations.title: Love Don't Co$t a Thing
recommendations.overview: A high school outcast pays a cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend so he can be considered cool.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
recommendations.overview: Greg Heffley is a scrawny but ambitious kid with an active imagination and big plans to be rich and famous – he just has to survive middle school first.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: Loue-moi !
recommendations.overview: Lea opens an agency where anybody can rent her to play the part the clients need: a daughter, a girlfriend, a customer, you name it...

recommendations.title: Me and Orson Welles
recommendations.overview: New York, 1937. A teenager hired to star in Orson Welles' production of Julius Caesar becomes attracted to a career-driven production assistant.
